title: E2E Integration & Demo Polish
description: Wire the full flow end-to-end with 1 curated PDF. Fix any styling issues, broken links, or API errors. Ensure the happy path works smoothly from upload to form submission. Basic accessibility check.
acceptanceCriteria: Full demo flow works: Upload curated PDF → see extracted fields → edit a label and type → save → publish → open renderer → see GOV.UK form → fill in → submit → see confirmation
Curated test PDF included in /backend/test-fixtures/ and documented in README
No console errors or unhandled promise rejections during the demo flow
GOV.UK styling consistent across all pages: header, phase banner, footer, typography
All navigation links work: dashboard → editor → renderer → back
Error states handled gracefully: upload failure, save failure, publish failure, schema fetch failure
Basic accessibility check: all form inputs have visible labels, keyboard navigation through entire flow, focus visible on interactive elements
Page titles are descriptive on each route (WCAG 2.4.2)
Form editor and renderer use correct GOV.UK heading hierarchy (h1, h2)
README.md updated with complete setup instructions, demo walkthrough, and known limitations
definitionOfDone: Demo flow completed successfully 3 times without errors
No TypeScript errors in either backend or frontend
GOV.UK styling looks correct on all pages
Keyboard-only navigation works for the full demo flow
README documents the complete demo script
Evaluator must run and produce a passing evaluation-05.json before sprint is marked complete
